summary: Completed backend testing for Voice Agent Romanian TTS optimization. All core functionality working correctly with optimized ElevenLabs settings.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTML frontend page instead of JSON health data
minor_bugs.impact: Root health check not working, but /api/health works correctly

configuration_notes.note: API key not configured, but voice settings are properly set for when key is added
configuration_notes.impact: TTS will not work until API key is provided

passed_tests: API Root Endpoint (/api/) - Returns proper message
Health Endpoint (/api/health) - All required fields present including voice configuration
Voice Settings Endpoint (/api/voice-settings) - Returns optimized parameters
Voice Settings Validation - All parameters match expected values (stability=0.6, similarity_boost=0.75, style=0.4, use_speaker_boost=true)
TTS Provider Configuration - Set to 'elevenlabs' as required
Romanian Text Processing - /api/simulate-turn correctly processes Romanian input
Language Detection - Properly detects Romanian language ('ro')
Response Generation - Generates appropriate Romanian responses
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor routing issue: Root /health endpoint returns HTML instead of JSON. The /api/health endpoint works correctly. Also note that elevenlabs_configured shows false - this is expected if no API key is set, but all voice settings are properly configured.
